ticket.subject: Re: LIV 2 FISH - UPS Account #H55R88   -   Introduction to PluginHive
ticket.raw_subject: Re: LIV 2 FISH - UPS Account #H55R88   -   Introduction to PluginHive
ticket.description:
Hi Ken, 

Greetings, and thanks for reaching out! 

We’d be happy to support your customer with both UPS account-based Ground Saver pricing within Shopify and batch shipment processing, these are well within our platform’s capabilities. 

We’re available to jump on a quick Teams call at your convenience and help them get started right away. Please feel free to add the customer to this email thread so we can coordinate directly and move things forward efficiently. 

Alternatively, you can use the link below to book a slot with our onboarding team at a time that works best: [Book a slot <https://appointments.pluginhive.com/appointment/book-a-slot/?storeUrl=livfishing.co&email=kllewellyn@ups.com&ticket=&key=1776314039781>] 

You can also reach us anytime at +1 (831) 267-6349 if that’s easier. 

Looking forward to connecting soon.

Best Regards,

Abhilash S | Digital Marketing & Partnerships
Connect with us on LinkedIn <https://www.linkedin.com/company/Pluginhive>

> Functionality to produce batch shipments

Greetings, and thanks for reaching out!



**We’d be happy to support your customer with both UPS account-based Ground Saver pricing within Shopify and batch shipment processing, **these are well within our platform’s capabilities.



We’re available to jump on a quick Teams call at your convenience and help them get started right away. Please feel free to add the customer to this email thread so we can coordinate directly and move things forward efficiently.



Alternatively, you can use the link below to book a slot with our onboarding team at a time that works best: [Book a slot]



You can also reach us anytime at +1 (831) 267-6349 if that’s easier.

comments.html_body:
Hi Ken, 

Greetings, and thanks for reaching out! 

We’d be happy to support your customer with both UPS account-based Ground Saver pricing within Shopify and batch shipment processing, these are well within our platform’s capabilities. 

We’re available to jump on a quick Teams call at your convenience and help them get started right away. Please feel free to add the customer to this email thread so we can coordinate directly and move things forward efficiently. 

Alternatively, you can use the link below to book a slot with our onboarding team at a time that works best: [Book a slot] 

You can also reach us anytime at +1 (831) 267-6349 if that’s easier. 

Looking forward to connecting soon.

Best Regards,

Abhilash S | Digital Marketing & Partnerships
Connect with us on LinkedIn

Are you or is someone available to conduct an introductory visit via a TEAMS call – just as quickly as possible?

Ken Llewellyn

comments.body:
Hi Ken,


Thank you for the update, and for including Sergey on the thread. Noted on the UPS subsidy via the Digital Connections Program.



We’d be happy to connect directly and take this forward. Could you please book a time at your convenience using the link below? [Book a slot]



Also, to help us proceed without delays during the discussion, could you please keep the below details ready or share them with us in advance:



- CTP Approval Code
- Business / Company Name (as registered with UPS)
- Business Address (as registered with UPS)



Looking forward to speaking with you.



Best Regards,

Abhilash S | Digital Marketing & Partnerships
Connect with us on LinkedIn

comments.body:
Hello Sergey,

Good day!

We have a meeting scheduled at 2:45 PM today. I am sharing the Zoom Invite below. Kindly confirm once you have joined.

Meeting Link: https://us06web.zoom.us/j/89105641478?pwd=aHy4P2hASzV7wNanQmN1p6IseQpqGh.1
Meeting ID: 891 0564 1478
Forward: 986568

NOTE: The meeting is scheduled for 30 minutes. We kindly request you to be present on the call as per the scheduled timings, extending the call or delayed calls are not encouraged due to prior commitments.

Pre-requisites:

- Ensure that your system has a working microphone.
- Permissions to share screen

Best regards,
Sagar K S
PluginHive

comments.body:
Request #384651 "Welcome to Shopify Partner Plugi..." was closed and merged into this request. Last comment in request #384651:

Hello Matthew,

 Greeting from Shopify Partner PluginHive!

 Thank you for installing our Shopify App - **“PH Multi Carrier Shipping Label App”** on liv2fish.myshopify.com

 Our team would like to assist you with the complete app onboarding.

 We request you let us know a suitable time for the onboarding session, which will not take more than 10 mins. Feel free to reply to this email (or) share your contact number, we will get in touch with you.

 You can also refer our documentation to set up the app and start shipping - click here to know more

 Looking forward to hearing from you.

 Thanks and Regards,
 Team PluginHive
https://www.pluginhive.com/about/#team

comments.body:
US Store
UPS account added
4755 orders in last 14 days

Assisted the customer in the following:


- App Installation and UPS account integration
- Enabling SurePost services
- App Settings (Address details, packaging, automation rules)
- Assisted in the label genration (bulk process)
- Showed the label printing and gave details about order fulfilment through the app
- Assisted in label cancelation

Customer said they would be processing around 10k orders in a month through UPS. They wanted to use USPS as well, so informed to get an account created and add the account to the app

Customer has selected $99 plan and informed they will be getting 14 day trial period and we can extend trial period for another 14 days if needed

Pending action - Awaiting response from UPS rep to provide details for UPS CTP process

Session Recording Link - https://drive.google.com/file/d/1fH3YcLlulw7IfaOyXF49jUZyWroPjIbX/view?usp=sharing
